text_block_list.text: —Every journey has a beginning.
Endings are like life itself - they are told in many different ways. However, for beginnings—… there's only one way.

…and that's trouble. Shall we take a look back to the past? 
How we came to be here, the beginning of… this journey.
—On a certain day. "I want to gaze upon the scenery of somewhere unknown." That strong desire just suddenly appeared in my head.
…And now, following that desire, I was walking along an unbeaten path. Just as I was about to finish crossing this worn rope bridge—
(Crack… crackle snap!!)
…The bridge had collapsed, and I was now lost with no way to return back home. Just as I was thinking of waiting here until help arrived—
Following the sound further ahead, I came across a lone umamusume playing it. This was such a mystical scene that I couldn't help but get lost in her performance…
—… Yo. Are you in a middle of a journey too?

—So now you can't go back. Haha, now that's quite the disaster. 
…Well, at least you're alive, safe and sound.
choice_data_list: That certainly is the silver lining…
That certainly is the silver lining…

text_block_list.text:
Regardless, it seems our goals are the same. 
…Maybe this is also a fateful encounter. Shall we head off further into the unknown together?

If you're fine with the route I took, I can tell you. 
…Although, even though there's civilization over there, getting there before the end of the day is unreasonable.
Since that's the case, let's just go until we reach the spot we're searching. It's just my personal theory, but a journey is a lot more interesting when something unexpected happens.

Alright, it's decided. 
Let us be off now.

—However, coming all the way here just for a pretty view, huh. 
Quite the adventurous spirit you got there.
choice_data_list: You're in the same boat, you always take trips like this?
You're in the same boat, you always take trips like this?

text_block_list.text: Yeah. If there's somewhere I feel like going, I just go. This time too, I wanted to see a really nice view and now I'm here.
…Hm. The vegetation of this area is different, making it hard to see. Make sure you're watching where you step.
choice_data_list: We wouldn't even notice if an animal was here…
We wouldn't even notice if an animal was here…

text_block_list.text: They might suddenly jump out at us. If something jumps out and attacks us from behind, do shout to let me know. If I feel like it, I'll help you out.
…The path to the place we were looking for was pretty steep. It was by no means an easy journey, but walking alongside her, I mysteriously didn't feel any pain—
—Nice. We're here.

Mmm～… Now that's a nice view! 
Being so close to the sky… The wind is feeling great too…
Seeing the bare Earth and the vast sky. The sight of both of them combined… made me feel refreshed. "Scenery that makes you want to run", I get it now!

…Okay, let's eat something here for a bit. 
Afterwards we can stroll around the—

—… The air smells different. 
…Ah, we're not gonna make it.

As soon as she said that, the weather suddenly changed. 
Just as I was thinking how comical the empty sky just filled with dark clouds—

Oh～ Oh～! It really is like a giant bucket here～! 
Hahaha! Look, my shoes are already soaking wet!
choice_data_list: No use worrying over it now.
No use worrying over it now.

text_block_list.text:
So this is what they mean by, all you could do is laugh. 
This sudden and absurd rainfall just drained any strength in me to resist it.

Hah… it feels like I'm connected to the sky… 
Now then… What are you going to do?
…It seemed like she was reveling in this unexpected situation. She looked like she was having a great time and I was starting to feel jealous—
Letting her words spur me on, I dropped all my bags, and started running with no goal in mind. The feeling of raindrops pattering over my body was pleasant and made me want to run even more…

Facing the skies above, I let out a huge cry. 
In contrast to the rain, my heart was starting to clear up very quickly.
Ooh～
—That looks nice. Looks pretty fun!
She caught up to me in a second and then in the next second she was carrying me, immediately after that I was being carried on her back—
—I felt as though I had become the wind itself. The rain and the scenery around me were passing by me at an incredible speed!
Completely forgetting the fact I was being carried on her back, I was in bliss. The feeling of her sharp running was hitting my whole body—

AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAH!!! 
—Come on, you can shout louder than that, right!?

Nice! That's what I'm talking about! Haha!! 
Let's run even faster!!!!!!!
The two of us continued playing in the rain, shouting with all our might. Letting go of our feelings, doing as we please, with nothing holding us back.
Forgetting about time itself… just like children—
…Then night came.

Guess this will be our campsite for today. 
…Well, it feels like it won't be an issue.
Since she was there, I was able to achieve my goal of seeing a great vista. Additionally, I was able to experience something I wouldn't in my normal day-to-day life.
As I sit here and look back at how dazzling it felt to run with no care in the world… It was an unexpected experience. Truth be told…

Glad to hear it. 
…Thanks to you, the rain became enjoyable.
…The nights are still long. How about I talk about a certain journey, just to kill some time.
choice_data_list: What type of journey was it?

text_block_list.text:
The path they've taken is surprisingly long… 
Even after arriving at their final destination… 
on soil completely foreign to them…
But on that very soil, no one could've ever imagined it, there stood a peerless gold… It was that type of journey.
…In the beginning, they weren't the strongest thing around—
